SEARCH
Package com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.contract

Class ForgeController<E,ID,R extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<E,ID>,S extends ForgeService<E,ID,R>>

java.lang.Object
com.kivojenko.spring.forge.jpa.contract.ForgeController<E,ID,R,S>
Type Parameters:
E - the entity type
ID - the ID type
R - the repository type
S - the service type
@RestController public abstract class ForgeController<E,ID,R extends org.springframework.data.jpa.repository.JpaRepository<E,ID>,S extends ForgeService<E,ID,R>> extends Object
Abstract base implementation of controller that delegates to a ForgeService. Used when a service layer is requested.

  • Method Details

    • count

      @GetMapping("/count") public long count()

    • create

      @PostMapping @ResponseStatus(code=CREATED) public E create(@Valid @RequestBody E entity)

    • getById

      @GetMapping("/{id}") public E getById(@PathVariable(name="id") ID id)

    • exists

      @RequestMapping(method=HEAD, path="/{id}") public boolean exists(@PathVariable(name="id") ID id)

    • update

      @PutMapping("/{id}") @ResponseStatus(code=CREATED) public E update(@PathVariable(name="id") ID id, @Valid @RequestBody E entity)

    • delete

      @DeleteMapping("/{id}") @ResponseStatus(code=NO_CONTENT) public void delete(@PathVariable(name="id") ID id)
